$schema: Manual URL redirects — merged into the redirect table alongside the Shopify Admin export (redirects.json). Use this file for redirects that must SURVIVE the daily `pull-inventory.mjs` sync, which overwrites redirects.json wholesale. Same shape as redirects.json: { source, destination }. Sources are path-only (no query/hash/regexp meta — see build-redirects-table.mjs#isValidSource). Listed first at build time so a manual entry overrides a stale Shopify one for the same source.

redirects.note: SEMrush 20260705 crawl (issues 2 + 8): 4 mattress-buying-guide articles link /pages/quiz in their CMS bodies, which 404s — the sleep quiz lives at /sleep-quiz. Shopify urlRedirect gid://shopify/UrlRedirect/489990881533 created 2026-07-05 as the durable source of truth; mirrored here so the middleware table serves the 301 immediately (headless traffic never hits Shopify's redirect layer).

SEMrush audit 20260625 (duplicate title tag, error id 6): the daily-blog automation published a near-duplicate 'Best Mattress for Lower Back Pain in Los Angeles' in the legacy beds-mattresses blog (2026-06-24), duplicating the established mattress-buying-guide article (2026-06-16). Consolidate to the primary-blog canonical.

Slug rebrand 2026-06-24: the 4th of July sale page was renamed from 'independence-day-sale-2026' to match the customer-facing '4th of July' branding and the target search phrase ('4th of july mattress sale', 880/mo). 301 the old handle so existing links + SEO carry over.
Slug rebrand 2026-06-24: 2027 sale page renamed to match (see independence-day-sale-2026 note).

Slug rebrand 2026-06-24: curated 4th of July sale collection renamed from 'independence-day-sale'. Was also unpublished (published to zero channels -> 404); now published to the storefront channels. 301 the old handle.

SEMrush 20260611 audit: this collections URL 404s (no such collection). /pages/mattress-accessories looked like the natural target but that page is UNPUBLISHED in Shopify (it 404s too — verified 20260611) and its body is one thin sentence, not worth publishing. /collections/bedding is the live accessories umbrella (40 products: protectors, toppers, pillows, sheets). Fixes the single site-wide 4xx.

The Shopify article itself is left published for the merchant to delete.

SEMrush 20260623 audit: NEW 4xx error (issue 2) + broken internal link (issue 8). The how-to-clean-a-mattress-complete-guide article body links to this URL, but the 'signs-time-new-mattress' article ('5 Signs it's Time for a New Mattress') is UNPUBLISHED in Shopify (isPublished:false) so the storefront 404s it, and its blog 'la-mattress-stores-blog' itself redirects to /blogs/mattress-buying-guide. Route to the closest live equivalent, the published '7 Signs That You Need A New Mattress'. resolveRedirectHrefs rewrites the body link at render (clears issue 8); the URL 301s via middleware (clears issue 2).

20260626 cleanup: the daily-blog automation published this article to the DEPRECATED beds-mattresses blog (2026-06-23), which is excluded from the XML sitemap, HTML sitemap, and /blogs hub — so it rendered live (200) but was fully orphaned. The LA mattress-disposal intent is already covered by the canonical, sitemap-included mattress-care-tips article. Consolidate to it instead of recreating a duplicate.

20260626 cleanup: second near-duplicate 'mattress stores in LA' guide auto-published to the deprecated beds-mattresses blog (2026-06-20) — orphaned. Consolidate to the same mattress-buying-guide pillar.

Deep audit seo-organic-04 (2026-07): this deleted page still ranks #6 for 'mattress store marina del rey' (Semrush 2026-07-03 pull) but 404s — the page was removed from Shopify with no redirect. Deep audit seo-organic-02 (2026-07): the 123k/mo 'full size bed dimensions' cluster was split across two surviving canonicals — this post (pos 47 on the 74k head term, 2 inbound 301s) and width-couples (pos 41 on the head term + pos 46 on the 27.1k variant). Consolidate on the stronger ranker; build-redirects-table's chain flattening re-points the 2 existing inbound redirects (measurements-room-layout-tips, how-much-space) directly at width-couples. Content fold-in of unique sections pending Shopify article access.
